# Elloquist

> Where beauty and curiosity collide, exploring the science of living things, stories hidden in culture, music, and memory, and the quiet wonder of a well-tended life.

Elloquist is a science and culture media brand founded by Ellen Hermance, publishing YouTube videos, newsletters on Substack, and essays on Medium. Operated by Elloquist LLC. The guiding ethos: "Look Closer. Find It Fascinating."

## Site

- [Home](https://elloquist.com/): Brand homepage: overview of Elloquist's mission, featured videos, and products

## Videos

- [What Your Houseplants Are Actually Doing to Your Brain](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=seXhv_BkZ48): The neuroscience behind how houseplants affect mood, cognition, and brain function. Published April 20, 2026.
- [The DNA of Nostalgia: Why Music Takes You Back](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bx-i3oeYQ60): The science of music-triggered memory and why certain songs transport you instantly to a specific moment in time. Published May 5, 2026.

## Topics

- The Science of Living Things: epigenetics, plant biology, cell science, and the hidden intelligence of living organisms
- Stories Hidden in Culture: anthropology, folklore, pop culture, and social history
- Music, Memory & the Mind: the neuroscience of sound and how music anchors experience in time
- The Well-Tended Life: houseplants, biophilic design, slow living, and the science behind why living things improve wellbeing

## Products

- [PlantCareAI](https://plantcareai.app): App built by Elloquist that uses your plant type, local weather, and AI to give personalized care advice, weather-aware reminders, and a full care history for every plant you own. Free to start.

## Social & Content

- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@elloquist): Videos on science, culture, memory, and the living world
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/elloquist): Visual content and behind-the-scenes
- [TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@elloquist): Short-form educational videos
- [Pinterest](https://www.pinterest.com/elloquist): Curated visual inspiration
- [Substack](https://substack.com/@elloquist): Newsletter and long-form essays
- [Medium](https://elloquist.medium.com/): Long-form writing and essays
- [X / Twitter](https://x.com/elloquist): Short-form posts and updates
- [Threads](https://www.threads.com/@elloquist): Short-form posts and community
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/elloquist): Community and brand updates
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/elloquist/): Professional brand presence
- [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/user/elloquist/): Community engagement and discussions
- [Audio.com](https://audio.com/@elloquist): Audio content
